lambda_layers.name: base-node-utils
lambda_layers.purpose: Common AWS SDK and utilities used by all Lambda functions

dynamodb_tables.purpose: Store todo items with user association
dynamodb_tables.migration_notes: Original key: cognito-username (HASH), id (RANGE). Migrated to: userId (Cognito Sub UUID) as HASH, id as RANGE.

post_confirmation.purpose: Registration only creates credentials in Users table, which is deleted. No business initialization needed.

table_initialization.strategy: Custom Resource Lambda during CloudFormation deployment
table_initialization.notes: Only create TodoTable, skip UserTable creation as it's handled by Cognito

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by Cognito User Pool - Frontend calls AWS Amplify Auth.signUp()
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: import { Auth } from 'aws-amplify'; await Auth.signUp({username, password, attributes: {email}})

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by Cognito User Pool - Frontend calls AWS Amplify Auth.signIn()
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: import { Auth } from 'aws-amplify'; await Auth.signIn(username, password)

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by API Gateway Cognito Authorizer - Token validation at gateway layer, not in Lambda code
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: N/A - API Gateway automatically validates Cognito JWT tokens

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by API Gateway Cognito Authorizer - Token validation at gateway layer, not in Lambda code
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: N/A - API Gateway automatically validates Cognito JWT tokens

dropped_functions.reason: Replaced by Cognito User Pool - Tokens generated by Cognito, not application code
dropped_functions.frontend_integration: N/A - Cognito generates JWT tokens after successful authentication

dropped_functions.reason: Infrastructure script - Table creation handled by SAM template CloudFormation resources
User authentication moved to Cognito User Pool - Credentials table deleted; no business profile fields needed
Password hashing handled by Cognito User Pool, not application code
JWT handling moved to Cognito and API Gateway Authorizer
